chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ مِنْ حَقِّ الْإِمَامِ عَلَى الرَّعِيَّةِ وَ حَقِّ الرَّعِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِمَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 104 – What is Obligated from the rights of the Imam<sup>asws</sup> upon the citizen and the rights of the citizen upon the Imam<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول وآخره مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (344/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول وآخره مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (344/ 4)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا تَصْلُحُ الْإِمَامَةُ إِلَّا لِرَجُلٍ فِيهِ ثَلَاثُ خِصَالٍ وَرَعٌ يَحْجُزُهُ عَنْ مَعَاصِي اللَّهِ وَ حِلْمٌ يَمْلِكُ بِهِ غَضَبَهُ وَ حُسْنُ الْوِلَايَةِ عَلَى مَنْ يَلِي حَتَّى يَكُونَ لَهُمْ كَالْوَالِدِ الرَّحِيمِ .
وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى حَتَّى يَكُونَ لِلرَّعِيَّةِ كَالْأَبِ الرَّحِيمِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Salih Bin Al Sindy, from Ja’far Bin Bashir, from Hannan, from his father,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The Imamate is not correct except for a man in whom there are three characteristics – piety detaining him<sup>asws</sup> from disobeying Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and forbearance he<sup>asws</sup> can control his<sup>asws</sup> anger with, and good guardianship upon the ones he<sup>asws</sup> rules over until he<sup>asws</sup> happens to be like the merciful father to them’.
And in another report: ‘Until he<sup>asws</sup> happens to be to the citizens like the merciful father’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Mu‘awiya ibn Hakim from Muhammad ibn Muslim from a man from Tabaristan called Muhammad Qal. Mu‘awiya has said that he met this man from Tabaristan who has said the following. “I heard Ali ibn Musa (a.s.) say, “A bankrupt who would lend or borrow –uncertainty is from Mu‘awiya- will given one years time to pay. If he still could not pay, the Imam it off from public treasury.”
